description_long: This is a mid-sized, four-door sedan with a boxy, classic design reminiscent of American cars from the late 1970s to early 1980s. The body is painted in a muted gray color, with chrome accents on the bumpers, grille, and window trim. The car features black wheels with simple hubcaps and a slightly raised rear trunk. The windows are tinted dark, and the side mirrors are mounted on the front doors. Both the front and rear of the vehicle have rectangular lights, with the front grille displaying horizontal chrome bars. The overall appearance suggests a sturdy, utilitarian vehicle suitable for urban streets and residential neighborhoods.
description: A classic, boxy gray four-door sedan with chrome accents, black wheels, and tinted windows. The design is utilitarian and reminiscent of late 20th-century American cars.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the sedan, four doors, black wheels, and chrome trim.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the trunk, rear bumper, taillights, and a visible license plate.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the sedan's length and door arrangement.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the chrome grille, rectangular headlights, and front bumper.
attribute_license_plate: Present on rear, rectangular, white with dark text, details unreadable
attribute_wheel_design: Black wheels with simple, solid hubcaps, no visible spokes
